name: specz
description: Spec-driven workflow plugin with task-size routing, optional design, traceable tasks, verification evidence, bounded repair loops, archive history, and lifecycle status checks.

interface.shortDescription: Run efficient spec-driven workflows with small-task fast paths.
interface.longDescription: Specz helps agents route work by task size, execute small specs directly, and use optional design, traceable tasks, verification evidence, archive, status, and bounded repair loops for larger work.
defaultPrompt: Use specz to clarify the behavior spec for this task.
Use specz to plan a new spec bundle for this task.
Run the specz execution flow for the current change.
Verify this implementation with the specz verifier.
Archive this completed spec bundle into a single workflow record.
Check the status of active specz bundles.
